Commercial Asphalt Paving Richmond VA

J. Worden & Sons is the trusted commercial asphalt paving contractor for Richmond businesses, property managers, and contractors. From parking lot installation and repairs to large-scale industrial paving, we deliver professional results on time and on budget.

Call for Project Consultation: (804) 446-1296

Why Commercial Clients Choose J. Worden & Sons

40+ Years of Commercial Paving Experience — We've built parking lots, access roads, and industrial surfaces for hundreds of businesses across Virginia and the Carolinas.

Licensed, Insured & Bonded — Full coverage and compliance for all commercial projects. We work with property managers, HOAs, and contractors with confidence.

Fast Turnaround & Minimal Downtime — We coordinate around your business needs. Multi-phase projects, night paving, emergency repairs—we're equipped to handle it.

Transparent Pricing & Project Management — Detailed estimates, clear timelines, and regular updates. No surprises.

Commercial Asphalt Paving Services

Parking Lot Paving

New parking lot installation, striping, and ADA-compliant marking. We handle design, grading, base prep, and professional asphalt laying for commercial properties.

Lot Repair & Maintenance

Pothole filling, crack sealing, resurfacing, and sealcoating keep your parking lot safe and attractive. Preventive maintenance extends lifespan by years.

Industrial & Heavy-Use Paving

Access roads, loading areas, and industrial surfaces designed for heavy equipment and constant traffic. Built to last with proper base and compaction.

Line Striping & Markings

Professional parking space striping, directional arrows, loading zones, and safety markings. All MUTCD-compliant.

Seal Coating & Chip Seal

Extend asphalt life and improve curb appeal. Regular sealcoating programs reduce major repair costs.

Grading & Site Prep

Full grading, excavation, and base preparation for new commercial projects. We ensure proper drainage and foundation.

Commercial Projects We've Completed

Our portfolio includes parking lots for office complexes, retail centers, medical facilities, industrial parks, and multi-unit residential properties across the Richmond area. References and project photos available upon request.

Contractor & Property Manager Advantages

Reliability You Can Count On

Fourth-generation family business. We show up on schedule, deliver quality work, and maintain professional communication throughout the project.

Competitive Bidding

We work with general contractors and provide competitive quotes for multi-property portfolios and ongoing maintenance contracts.

Flexible Project Delivery

Phased projects, emergency repairs, seasonal maintenance programs—we're flexible to meet your timeline and budget.

Service Areas

Richmond | Chesterfield | Henrico | Chester | Petersburg | Colonial Heights | Glen Allen | Midlothian — and surrounding areas throughout Central Virginia.

Ready to Discuss Your Commercial Paving Project?

Contact us for a consultation. We'll evaluate your property, discuss project scope and timeline, and provide a detailed estimate.

Call (804) 446-1296 for Commercial Quote

J. Worden & Sons is available for emergency repairs, large-scale projects, and ongoing maintenance contracts. Ask about volume discounts for property management companies.

J. Worden & Sons Asphalt Paving

Licensed & Insured · Virginia Class A · Since 1984

Richmond's 4th-generation asphalt paving contractor. Driveways, parking lots, sealcoating & hardscapes across Central Virginia since 1984.
